name: AI TRiSM Market Index
description: Comprehensive machine-readable dataset covering 66+ vendors in the AI Trust, Risk, and Security Management (AI TRiSM) market. Includes vendor profiles with funding, capabilities, and Gartner recognition; market size estimates from 8 analyst firms; segment analysis; M&A activity (2024-2025); and regulatory compliance tracking for EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, GDPR, SR 11-7, and other global AI regulations. Updated automatically via GitHub Actions.
rai:dataCollection: Vendor data collected from official press releases, company websites, Gartner research citations from vendor blogs, analyst firm reports, TechCrunch, Business Wire, PR Newswire, CyberScoop, SecurityWeek, and VentureBeat. Market sizing data from named analyst firms with source URLs. Regulatory data from official government and standards body publications.
rai:dataBiases: Vendor coverage may be biased toward US and European vendors due to English-language source availability. Private company funding data may be incomplete. Market size estimates vary significantly between analyst firms due to different scope definitions.
rai:dataLimitations: 1) Funding totals for private companies may be incomplete or estimated from press reports. 2) Acquired vendor websites may redirect to acquirer pages. 3) Market size estimates from different analyst firms are not directly comparable due to scope differences. 4) This dataset should not be used as financial investment advice.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: No personal data. Dataset covers organizations, products, and market statistics only.

distribution.name: vendors.json
distribution.description: Machine-readable database of 66+ AI TRiSM vendors across 10 categories with funding, capabilities, Gartner recognition, and acquisition status

distribution.name: market-data.json
distribution.description: AI TRiSM market size estimates from 8 analyst firms, segment analysis, regional data, funding rounds, and M&A activity

distribution.name: regulatory-tracker.json
distribution.description: Global AI regulatory compliance tracker with key milestones, penalties, and enforcement dates for EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and 7+ other regulations

recordSet.name: vendors
recordSet.description: Individual AI TRiSM vendor records with profile information

field.description: Vendor operational status: Active, Acquired, or Inactive

recordSet.name: market_estimates
recordSet.description: AI TRiSM market size estimates from analyst firms
